understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate each level to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', completing the current level (BP35) and then continuing through subsequent levels until the game is won, while avoiding deadly spike tiles.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: On each turn you choose a horizontal action (MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT), and after that move the character automatically continues moving in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid/support tile, hits a hazard (spikes end the attempt immediately), or reaches the goal. CLICK can be used on breakable/clickable tiles (e.g., 'x') at a specified [x, y] to remove them and open paths without moving the player. UNDO reverts the previous action. Each level allows 2 attempts with up to 50 turns per attempt, and the game provides landing previews (left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan) to plan safe moves and prioritize passage columns that drop to new sections.

understanding.mechanics_understanding: On each turn you choose a horizontal action (MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT), and after that move the character automatically continues moving in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid/support tile, hits a hazard (spikes end the attempt immediately), or reaches the goal. CLICK can be used on breakable/clickable tiles (e.g., 'x') at a specified [x, y] to remove them and open paths without moving the player. UNDO reverts the previous action. Each level allows 2 attempts with up to 50 turns per attempt, and the game provides landing previews (left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan) to plan safe moves and prioritize passage columns that drop to new sections.
